name: Self Improvement Assistant
description: Autonomous codebase analysis and GitHub issue creation — analyze repositories for bugs, security issues, and improvement opportunities, then create structured GitHub issues from findings

github_token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with repo scope (create at https://github.com/settings/tokens)

tools.name: self_analyze_codebase
tools.description: Analyze a GitHub repository's JS/TS source files for bugs, security issues, and improvement opportunities

tools.name: self_create_issue
tools.description: Create a structured GitHub issue from a code analysis finding

tools.name: self_schedule_analysis
tools.description: Enable or disable periodic autonomous codebase analysis

tools.name: self_list_analysis_history
tools.description: List past analysis runs with timestamps, repositories, and findings counts
